response.overview: About this experimental short, director Robert Darroll wrote, "The composition evolves a narrative line that is fragmented and temporally and spatially inconsistent. Seldom does any conscious being have one consistent interpretation of all the dimensions (introspective consciousness, social, medical, global and cosmic awareness) that make up our spheres of consciousness. We live with quite contradictory sets of laws applicable only in individual dimensions. We seek to create unity in an apparently random world. Mythologies are dysfunctional ideologies; they are meta-interpretations which have lost context."
response.title: Future Paleontology
